inputs.titre: Création du Comité international olympique (CIO) par Pierre de Coubertin

reason: The image depicts a plausible scene of a meeting in 1894 Paris, likely related to the creation of the IOC. The architecture, clothing, and furnishings align with the late 19th-century period. The use of candles for lighting is appropriate for the time. There are no immediately obvious anachronisms like modern technology. The scene is generally believable and devoid of fantasy elements. The lighting is somewhat reminiscent of early photography, though not perfectly emulated.
